case_title: GREAT WESTERN BANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK vs. TORRE, PHIL

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREAT WESTERN BANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TORRE, PHIL
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF, AND APPLICATION FOR AND, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREAT WESTERN BANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK SERVED JUN-02-1997, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT TORRE, PHIL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREAT WESTERN BANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRE, PHIL $9,231.05 PRINCIPAL, $4,635.75 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,880.80, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE #873634 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
